metadata.note: Recorded by the experimenter. Texts used verbatim; regeneration only on format failures (see Appendix B 4).

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Alice's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. The glass left a wet stain on the tile floor.
The cup slipped from the wooden table. The cup fell to the hard floor. The cup broke into several pieces. The cup created a huge mess on the rug.
The plate slid off the kitchen counter. The plate dropped to the stone floor. The plate shattered into tiny shards. The plate ruined the newly swept floor.
The bowl tumbled from the top shelf. The bowl crashed onto the tile floor. The bowl cracked into two large pieces. The bowl spilled hot soup everywhere.
The vase fell from the high shelf. The vase hit the hard wooden floor. The vase smashed into a hundred pieces. The vase scattered dirt across the room.
The car started the loud engine. The car drove down the busy street. The car hit a massive deep pothole. The car lost a silver metal hubcap.
The truck revved the powerful diesel engine. The truck sped down the empty highway. The truck ran over a sharp nail. The truck blew a large rubber tire.
The van left the crowded parking lot. The van traveled along the dirt road. The van encountered a huge fallen tree. The van sustained a scratched front bumper.
The taxi picked up the waiting passenger. The taxi navigated the dense city traffic. The taxi arrived at the busy airport. The taxi collected a large cash fare.
The bus opened the wide front doors. The bus welcomed the eager young students. The bus drove to the local school. The bus dropped the children off safely.
The pan sat on the hot stove. The pan began to smoke quite heavily. The pan caught on bright orange fire. The pan burned the food to a crisp.
The pot rested on the heating element. The pot boiled the clear cold water. The pot bubbled over the high edge. The pot extinguished the blue gas flame.
The skillet heated up on the burner. The skillet seared the thick juicy steak. The skillet splattered hot grease all around. The skillet created a delicious smelling meal.
The wok warmed over the open flame. The wok cooked the fresh green vegetables. The wok tossed the ingredients high up. The wok finished the tasty dinner dish.
The saucepan simmered the thick red liquid. The saucepan reduced the sauce quite perfectly. The saucepan coated the long thin pasta. The saucepan completed the wonderful Italian dinner.
The storm gathered in the dark sky. The storm blocked out the bright sun. The storm unleashed heavy pouring rain. The storm flooded the busy city streets.
The cloud formed over the high mountains. The cloud grew into a massive shape. The cloud dropped loud white hail stones. The cloud damaged the fragile local crops.
The hurricane brewed over the warm ocean. The hurricane approached the sandy coastal town. The hurricane destroyed the weak wooden houses. The hurricane left behind a terrible disaster.
The typhoon spun with incredible fierce winds. The typhoon struck the populated island nation. The typhoon knocked down tall power lines. The typhoon caused a massive power outage.
